summary: Backend testing completed for German Dating Platform legal pages and payment endpoints. Legal pages working correctly with substantial content. Payment endpoints exist and return appropriate German error messages when credentials missing (expected behavior). Some authentication issues with test users.

authentication_issues.issue: werner@eros.app login failing with provided credentials
authentication_issues.impact: Cannot test some bidirectional filtering and matching features
authentication_issues.details: User exists but password may be different from test credentials

minor_issues.issue: German quotes detection in legal terms test
minor_issues.impact: Test was looking for wrong quote format
minor_issues.details: Fixed - terms page contains correct German quotes „AGB

passed_tests: GET /api/legal - All 6 legal pages present (terms, privacy, imprint, community, cookies, cancellation)
GET /api/legal/terms - Substantial content >4000 characters with German quotes
GET /api/legal/{key} - All 6 pages have non-trivial content
GET /api/payments/packages - Returns required fields (enabled, provider, supported, packages, providers_live)
POST /api/payments/paypal/create-order - Returns 502 with German error when credentials missing (EXPECTED)
POST /api/payments/klarna/create-session - Returns 400 with German error when not configured (EXPECTED)
POST /api/payments/klarna/place-order - Returns 400 with German error when not configured (EXPECTED)
User authentication working (testing@test.com, alice@eros.app, bob@eros.app, sam@eros.app)
Legal page seeding mechanism working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: All requested features working correctly. Payment endpoints return expected German error messages when credentials missing (this is correct behavior). Legal pages have substantial content with proper German typography. Minor: werner@eros.app credentials need verification for complete testing coverage.
